items._note: EAST landing wall (encloses the primary suite from the landing/stair); one door = primary-bedroom entry (into the SOUTH primary room), in the walkable landing zone north of the stair.
Walk-in (NORTH) / primary bedroom (SOUTH) divider (z=6); door opens NORTH into the walk-in (clears the primary bed's headboard on this wall).
Primary <-> en-suite (extension) separator at x=-12; door from the primary bedroom into the en-suite.
West landing wall NORTH segment (z 6..16.0833): family-room + NW-bedroom east wall. Solid.

West landing wall SOUTH segment (z -11.9167..-1): SW-bedroom east wall (backs the stair). Solid. The z -1..5 gap between the segments is OPEN — the old central hall is now merged into the E-W hall/landing.
NW bedroom / alcove divider (z=6). The 5 ft alcove wall (x 15.0833..20.0833): a 36" door centered with 12" of wall each side. Opens N into the NW bedroom.
SW bedroom / alcove divider (z=-1). The 5 ft alcove wall: a 36" door centered with 12" of wall each side. Opens S into the SW bedroom.
J&J BATH east wall (x=20.0833, z -4..8.5): solid. West of it is the bath (on the west wet wall); east is the 5 ft alcove + bedroom strips. The bath is reached ONLY through the two bedrooms.
J&J BATH north wall (z=8.5, x 20.0833..31): door into the NW bedroom (opens into the bath).
J&J BATH south wall (z=-4, x 20.0833..31): door into the SW bedroom (opens into the bath).

FAMILY ROOM south wall = north wall of the E-W hall (z=6, aligned with the NW-bedroom south wall to make one continuous line across the floor). Door opens NORTH into the family room; the hall is south of it.
PRIMARY BEDROOM king (SOUTH room): headboard on the NORTH wall (walk-in divider, no window); foot points SOUTH to the window wall (no door). Clears the entry, en-suite, and walk-in doors.
items.head: N

items._note: SW BEDROOM queen: headboard on the EAST (landing) wall - interior, no window; foot points WEST toward the window wall (no door). Clears the bath's south door and the alcove door.
items.head: E

items._note: NW BEDROOM queen: headboard on the EAST (landing) wall - interior, no window; foot points WEST toward the window wall (no door). Clears the bath's north door.
items.head: E

items._note: J&J BATH (x 20.0833..31, z -4..8.5): all fixtures on the WEST wet wall (x=31) - shower N, double vanity mid (under the west window), toilet S. Bath doors are on the N and S walls, near x24.
PRIMARY EN-SUITE (extension x -22.92..-12, z -11.92..4): vanity on the north wall, shower SW, toilet on the separator wall.
FAMILY ROOM (landing north bay, x 3.9167..15.0833, z 5..16.0833): sofa against the west wall facing the TV on the east wall, with a rug between.
